extra.reason: Not a bug — misdiagnosis from stale HANDOFF. naint is hardcoded to 1 in Fortran (leapr.f90:292-294, never read from input), so the iprt=mod(j-1,naint)+1==1 gate is always open and Julia's unconditional SCT replacement already matches Fortran. Corrected the leapr.jl comment + HANDOFF. Real T80 residual is phonon-loop FP order = NJOY_jl-sc5.

ROOT CAUSE: sigma1.jl:146 'v = map(e->sqrt(alpha*e), seg_e)' rebuilds + heap-allocs the full length-nseg velocity array on EVERY sigma1_at call. broadn_grid calls sigma1_at O(nseg) times -> O(nseg^2) time + O(nseg^2) allocs (20k-pt synthetic: 1.79s / 1.82 GB). Fortran converts E->v ONCE per page (broadr.f90:1318-1322); broadn_grid already computes vel=sqrt.(alpha.*seg_e) at line 79 but sigma1_at ignores it. FP-safe: map/broadcast/scalar sqrt all bit-identical (verified). Fix in 58o.2: thread precomputed vel through sigma1_at.
